ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "time_kickoff" TEXT /* Kickoff time of the game */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular, playoff, etc.) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue FOREIGN KEY ("venue") REFERENCES venue_info ("venue_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent FOREIGN KEY ("opponent") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the opponent */,
  "league" TEXT /* League of the opponent */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the opponent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket sale */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "programs_ordered" INTEGER /* Number of programs ordered */,
  "programs_sold" INTEGER /* Number of programs sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by ticket sales */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Price of each ticket */,
  "seat_location" TEXT /* Location of the seats */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "percent_male" REAL /* Percentage of male attendees */,
  "percent_female" REAL /* Percentage of female attendees */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of attendees */,
  "location_distribution" TEXT /* Location distribution of attendees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concession_sales" (
  "concession_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concession sale */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "item" TEXT /* Name of the concession item */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the concession item sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the concession item */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the concession item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concession_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concession_sales_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking_sales" (
  "parking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking sale */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "lot" TEXT /* Name of the parking lot */,
  "spaces_sold" INTEGER /* Number of parking spaces sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by parking sales */,
  "parking_type" TEXT /* Type of parking (e.g., general, VIP, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parking_sales_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "engagement" REAL /* Engagement metric (e.g., likes, shares, etc.) */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan feedback entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "question" TEXT /* Survey question */,
  "response" TEXT /* Fan response to the survey question */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the fan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_feedback_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, marketer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Login time of the user */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Logout time of the user */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_day_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game day statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance for the game */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the game */,
  "engagement" REAL /* Engagement metric (e.g., likes, shares, etc.) */,
  "tickets_sold" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_day_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_day_revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "ticket_sales" REAL /* Revenue generated by ticket sales */,
  "concessions" REAL /* Revenue generated by concessions */,
  "parking" REAL /* Revenue generated by parking */,
  "merchandise" REAL /* Revenue generated by merchandise sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_day_revenue_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_info" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic data (e.g., age, location, etc.) */,
  "purchase_history" TEXT /* Purchase history (e.g., tickets, merchandise, etc.) */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Loyalty program status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate for the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the campaign */,
  "channels" TEXT /* Marketing channels used (e.g., email, social media, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crm_data" (
  "crm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CRM entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone, email, etc.) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of interaction */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Customer feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crm_data_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_info ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_info" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available at the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_info" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., concert, sports, etc.) */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsor_info" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "package_details" TEXT /* Details of the sponsorship package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)
